task_completion.description: The BraTS brain MRI volume is loaded and visible in the viewer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer interface shows brain MRI slices in the standard 2D views (axial, sagittal, coronal).

task_completion.description: The existing fiducial points (Point_A and Point_B) are visible
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two distinct markup points (spheres or crosshairs) labeled Point_A/Point_B or similar are visible in the slice views or 3D view.

task_completion.description: A line measurement tool has been used to create a ruler/line
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line segment is visible in the viewer, or a new Line entry appears in the Markups module list.

task_completion.description: The measurement line connects the two fiducial points
task_completion.visual_evidence: The endpoints of the drawn line coincide with the locations of the fiducial markers Point_A and Point_B.

task_completion.description: The distance measurement value is visible
task_completion.visual_evidence: A numeric length value (in mm) is displayed next to the line in the viewer or in the Measurement/Control column of the Markups module.

task_completion.description: The measurement is saved to the correct file path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save Data' dialog is shown with 'distance_measurement.mrk.json' selected for saving, or a file explorer shows the newly created file.

integrity.description: Agent used the Slicer GUI to measure, not a python script
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Markups toolbar or module panel, not code entry in the Python console.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually type the result into a text file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is not seen typing JSON content into a text editor; the file generation is handled by the Slicer 'Save' function.

integrity.description: Agent is interacting with the actual 3D Slicer application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard 3D Slicer layout (module panel on left, viewers on right).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The measurement tolerance is 15.0 mm. The VLM should verify that a visual line connects two specific points and a distance value is generated by the software.
